top3.sql:
WITH pre_conversion_events AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        action,
        path,
        search_type,
        stamp,
        MIN(CASE 
            WHEN action IN ('/detail', '/complete') THEN stamp 
            ELSE NULL 
        END) OVER (PARTITION BY session) AS first_conversion_stamp
    FROM activity_log
),
filtered_events AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        path,
        search_type
    FROM pre_conversion_events
    WHERE stamp < first_conversion_stamp
      AND search_typ...

WITH pre_conversion_events AS (
    SELECT 
        a1.session,
        a1.path,
        a1.search_type,
        a1.stamp AS event_stamp,
        (
            SELECT MIN(a2.stamp)
            FROM activity_log a2
            WHERE a2.session = a1.session
              AND (a2.action = '/detail' OR a2.action = '/complete')
        ) AS conversion_stamp
    FROM activity_log a1
    WHERE a1.search_type IS NOT NULL
      AND a1.search_type != ''
),
filtered_events AS (
    SELECT 
        session,...

WITH event_sequences AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        stamp,
        action,
        path,
        search_type,
        SUM(CASE WHEN action IN ('/detail', '/complete') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
            OVER (PARTITION BY session ORDER BY stamp, rowid ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS conversion_flag
    FROM activity_log
),
pre_conversion AS (
    SELECT 
        session,
        stamp,
        path,
        search_type
    FROM event_sequences
    WHERE conversion_flag = 0
